title: Stauracanthus boivinii
taxonomy: Stauracanthus boivinii belongs to the family Celastraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet or staff vine family. This species is further classified as a member of the genus Stauracanthus, a group of evergreen shrubs or small trees native to Madagascar. intro: Stauracanthus boivinii, also known as Bois bande or Bois de Saint Pierre, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Southeast Asia.
